completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 6 parts: web(web), mobile(mobile), shared(library), ui(library), config(library), supabase(backend)
Found 17 existing docs: 9 in docs/, 2 READMEs, 1 CLAUDE.md, 1 violet-ai-llms-txt.md, 4 CI/CD workflows
Tech stack analyzed: TanStack Start + Vite 7.3 (web), Expo SDK 55 + RN 0.83.2 (mobile), Supabase PG17 + 12 Edge Functions (backend)
Conditional analysis: 12 Edge Function API contracts, 15+ DB tables, 50+ web components, 17+ mobile components, state management patterns
Source tree documented with full annotations for all 6 parts
Development guide written: prerequisites, commands, env vars, testing, CI/CD
Integration architecture documented: 11 integration points, 3 data flow diagrams, dual-copy sync strategy
Architecture docs written for 4 parts: web, mobile, shared, supabase
Supporting docs: project-overview, component inventories (web + mobile), data-models, api-contracts
Master index generated with links to all 12 generated + 9 existing docs
Validation complete: all expected files exist, no incomplete markers
